3_ttm_quarterly.verified: TTM bar renders in quarterly and annual mode

4_percent_formula.description: Correct YoY % formula WITHOUT abs() in denominator

states: 3. Declining Business (Rev YoY < 0 AND NI YoY < 0)
4. Healthy Growth (Rev YoY > 0 AND NI YoY > 0)
5. Expansion (Rev YoY > 0 AND (NI YoY < 0 OR N/A))
6. Cutting Costs (Rev YoY < 0 AND NI YoY > 0)
